title: Greece — Individual Income Tax Return (Form Ε1, tax year 2025 edition)
description: The Independent Authority for Public Revenue's (AADE) Form Ε1, the annual personal income tax return, tax year 2025 edition, prescribed by decision Α.1062/2026 (Government Gazette ΦΕΚ Β' 1280/09.03.2026). Opens Greece's Taxes vertical (2 of 6; Greece's 1st vertical, Visa, opened via gr/mfa/application-for-schengen-visa). The field-by-field source is AADE's own 153-page official instructions manual, "Οδηγίες Συμπλήρωσης της Δήλωσης Φορολογίας Εισοδήματος Φυσικών Προσώπων Φορολογικού Έτους 2025" (1st edition, March 2026) — a prose instructions document, not a facsimile/AcroForm copy of the Ε1 form itself. This v1.0.0 deliberately scopes to the individual/salaried-taxpayer filing pathway: Πίνακας 1 (taxpayer identification, including spouse/ΜΣΣ joint-filing fields), a bounded, disclosed subset of Πίνακας 2 (clearance informational Yes/No declaration codes genuinely completed by the applicant and relevant to a salaried/pensioner filer), and the full Υποπίνακας 4Α (income from employment and pensions, and the withheld tax/foreign-income lines associated with it). Out of scope for this v1.0.0, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md: Πίνακας 3 (disability tax reduction), Υποπίνακας 4Β (seafarer/aircrew income taxed separately), Υποπίνακες 4Γ1/4Γ2 (agricultural/business income), and the companion Ε2 (rental income) and Ε3 (business financial statement) forms. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Greece or the Independent Authority for Public Revenue (AADE).

source.documentRef: "Οδηγίες Συμπλήρωσης της Δήλωσης Φορολογίας Εισοδήματος Φυσικών Προσώπων Φορολογικού Έτους 2025" (1st edition, March 2026), the official AADE instructions manual for Form Ε1, issued alongside decision Α.1062/2026 (ΦΕΚ Β' 1280/09.03.2026)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2621. Opens Greece's Taxes vertical (2 of 6). The live aade.gr host 403s all direct fetches from this sandbox (Akamai bot-wall), matching the same host-gating pattern already confirmed for gr/mfa/application-for-schengen-visa. Independently re-fetched via the Wayback Machine snapshot https://web.archive.org/web/20260413015535/https://www.aade.gr/sites/default/files/2026-03/Odigies_E1_2026_0.pdf: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 1,169,825 bytes, sha256 6055bc761a7ea193657176e80bbc0be68369f31aa26708c469b5c529310a3235 (independently computed via sha256sum on the freshly-downloaded file). Parsed with pdfjs-dist@6 (legacy build, getTextContent(), position-sorted by rounded y then x): confirmed 153 pages. Every field below was read directly from the printed text layer (this is a prose instructions manual, not an AcroForm/facsimile of the Ε1 form itself), citing the instructions' own §2.x subsection numbering, its own printed page numbers (footer), and — for Πίνακας 2 / Υποπίνακας 4Α — the instructions' own numbered 'Κωδικοί NNN-NNN' / 'Κωδικός NNN' field-code citations. Πίνακας 1 (§2.1) carries no such per-field code numbering in the source (it is written as general/edge-case prose, e.g. corrections via the taxpayer registry, spouse/ΜΣΣ identification, tax-resident-abroad confirmation, representative capacity) — its field list is disclosed in VERIFICATION.md as inferred from the instructions' own explicit references to specific data points, not from a printed box-by-box facsimile (none exists in this source).

fields.name: taxpayerTaxRegistrationNumber
fields.label: ΑΦΜ (taxpayer's Tax Registration Number)
fields.description: The taxpayer's own Greek Tax Registration Number (ΑΦΜ), a 9-digit number. Pre-filled by the Tax Administration from the taxpayer registry; the instructions describe only how to correct it via the Μητρώο (registry) before filing, not a fresh entry box — modeled here as the field itself for source fidelity.

fields.name: taxpayerAmka
fields.label: ΑΜΚΑ (taxpayer's Social Security Registration Number)
fields.description: The taxpayer's Social Security Registration Number (ΑΜΚΑ), an 11-digit number (DDMMYY + 5 digits). The source states this is mandatory on the return except for taxpayers who, for sensitive-personal-data reasons, decline to disclose it (for themselves or dependents), and for employees of the Black Sea Trade and Development Bank — modeled as optional per that disclosed exemption rather than as an unconditional `required: true`.

fields.name: taxpayerSurname
fields.label: Taxpayer's surname
fields.sourceRef: Instructions §2.1, p.28 (by symmetry with the spouse surname instruction; pre-filled from the taxpayer registry, corrected there if in error)

fields.name: taxpayerFirstName
fields.label: Taxpayer's first name
fields.sourceRef: Instructions §2.1, p.28 (by symmetry with the spouse identification instruction; pre-filled from the taxpayer registry)

fields.name: taxpayerFatherName
fields.label: Taxpayer's father's name
fields.description: Disclosed judgment call: the source discusses this field only via a special-case correction instruction for widowed/divorced/separated women who have not yet updated their ID (replace a former husband's name with the father's name) and via a note that military/police/coastguard/fire-service personnel without a police ID number use their service ID instead. The field itself — a standard identification item on the Ε1 — is inferred from these edge-case references, not from a printed box facsimile (none exists in this source).

fields.name: residentialAddress
fields.label: Home address
fields.description: Mandatory for every taxpayer without exception, per the source's own explicit instruction (distinguished there from the business-activity address, which applies only to filers with business income).
fields.sourceRef: Instructions §2.1, p.28: "η διεύθυνση κατοικίας συμπληρώνεται υποχρεωτικά από όλους ανεξαιρέτως τους φορολογούμενους"

fields.name: businessActivityAddress
fields.label: Business-activity address (if applicable)
fields.description: Only completed by filers who earn income from business activity — not applicable to the pure salaried/pension filer this v1.0.0 primarily targets, but printed on every Ε1 regardless and included here for Πίνακας 1 source fidelity.

fields.name: email
fields.label: E-mail address
fields.description: The source stresses this must be entered correctly since it is used for legally-effective notifications under Article 5 of the Tax Procedure Code (ΚΦΔ).

fields.name: taxResidencyCountry
fields.label: Country of tax residency (if a tax resident abroad)
fields.description: A tax resident of a foreign country filing a Greek return must confirm/complete this field, since it is used for cross-border information exchange. Left optional rather than gated with a synthetic 'is a foreign tax resident' condition the source does not itself provide as a discrete field — a disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: foreignTaxIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Foreign Tax Identification Number (ΑΦΤ)
fields.description: Mandatory only for a tax resident of a foreign country (per the source); may be a foreign ΑΦΜ equivalent, social-security number, ID number, or any other identifier the foreign tax authority uses. Left blank when the country of tax residency has no such requirement.

fields.name: foreignResidentialAddress
fields.label: Home address abroad (Latin characters)
fields.description: Completed by a tax resident of a foreign country, in Latin characters, per the source's own instruction.

fields.name: isMarriedOrCivilPartnership
fields.label: Married / civil partnership (ΕΓΓΑΜΟΣ/ΜΣΣ)
fields.description: The source's own instruction: mark this if married or a party to a civil partnership (ΜΣΣ); leave it unmarked if divorced, widowed, or separated.

fields.name: spouseSurname
fields.label: Spouse/ΜΣΣ's surname (joint filing)
fields.description: The source states the non-liable spouse's surname must match their ID document.

fields.name: spouseFirstName
fields.label: Spouse/ΜΣΣ's first name (joint filing)
fields.sourceRef: Instructions §2.1, p.27 ("τα στοιχεία...της συζύγου" — the spouse's own identification data, pre-filled from the registry and corrected there if in error)

fields.name: spouseTaxRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Spouse/ΜΣΣ's ΑΦΜ
fields.description: The source states married/civil-partnership taxpayers filing a joint return must complete this with the OTHER spouse's/ΜΣΣ's own ΑΦΜ (never the filer's own ΑΦΜ again). Left optional rather than `requiredWhen`-gated on `isMarriedOrCivilPartnership`, since the source further conditions it on filing jointly (as opposed to separately, which uses a different field) — a distinction with no discrete boolean field on the source to key a condition on; disclosed rather than silently resolved.

fields.name: spouseAmka
fields.label: Spouse/ΜΣΣ's ΑΜΚΑ

fields.name: representativeName
fields.label: Representative's name (if applicable)
fields.description: Completed only for the narrow set of scenarios the source lists: a guardian of a vacant estate, an agent/proxy, a judicial assistant, a temporary administrator, a bankruptcy trustee, or a judicial liquidator — filing on behalf of a minor, a person under judicial assistance, a deceased person's estate, or an estate under attachment/dispute/bankruptcy. Out of scope as a primary pathway for this v1.0.0 (which targets the standard self-filing individual), modeled as an optional pass-through field for Πίνακας 1 source fidelity.

fields.name: representativeCapacity
fields.label: Representative's capacity
fields.description: Free-text/slug description of which representative capacity applies (e.g. guardian of a vacant estate, agent/proxy, judicial assistant, temporary administrator, bankruptcy trustee, judicial liquidator, or tax representative of a non-resident). The source lists these as prose categories, not a closed set of distinct checkboxes, so this is modeled as a string rather than an enum.

fields.name: taxRepresentativeTaxRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Tax representative's ΑΦΜ
fields.description: The ΑΦΜ of the taxpayer's appointed tax representative (φορολογικός εκπρόσωπος) under Article 8 ΚΦΔ — required only for the non-resident-with-Greek-source-income scenario the source describes. When the spouse acts as the representative, the source instructs entering the spouse's own ΑΦΜ here.

fields.name: separateSpousalFilingOtherSpouseTin
fields.label: "Separate spousal return" field: other spouse's ΑΦΜ
fields.description: Completed by a married taxpayer who has chosen to file a separate return from their spouse, with the OTHER spouse's own ΑΦΜ. Pre-filled on electronic returns per the source.

fields.name: isPensionerBornBefore1961Taxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 013: taxpayer is a pensioner born on/before 31-12-1960
fields.description: Also completed by taxpayers receiving a monthly pension under Law 1296/1982 (article 33(ζ) ΚΦΕ cases). Directly relevant to a salaried/pensioner filer.

fields.name: isPensionerBornBefore1961Spouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 014: spouse/ΜΣΣ is a pensioner born on/before 31-12-1960

fields.name: isDiplomaticOrIntlOrgImputedIncomeExemptTaxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 015: taxpayer exempt from imputed-income (τεκμήρια) rules as foreign diplomatic/consular staff or EU/international-organization staff
fields.description: Applies to a foreign diplomatic/consular representative or embassy/international-mission staff holding a diplomatic passport, or staff of an EU institution or a treaty-based international organization operating in Greece — regardless of the taxpayer's own tax-residency status. Supporting proof (nationality/diplomatic-passport evidence or an employer's certificate) is produced only if requested by the Tax Administration.

fields.name: isDiplomaticOrIntlOrgImputedIncomeExemptSpouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 016: spouse/ΜΣΣ exempt from imputed-income (τεκμήρια) rules as foreign diplomatic/consular staff or EU/international-organization staff

fields.name: isElectronicPaymentExpenditureExemptTaxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 023: taxpayer exempt from the electronic-payment-expenditure requirement
fields.description: Applies to taxpayers aged 70+ (born on/before 31-12-1955), with disability of 80% or more, under judicial assistance, a foreign tax resident required to file in Greece, a public servant/employee posted abroad or a Greek tax resident living/working abroad, a minor required to file (born on/after 1-1-2007), performing mandatory military service, permanently resident in a village/island under the source's population thresholds (excluding designated tourist areas), a recipient of the Guaranteed Minimum Income, in long-term hospitalization (over 6 months), resident in a care home or psychiatric institution, or imprisoned.

fields.name: isElectronicPaymentExpenditureExemptSpouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 024: spouse/ΜΣΣ exempt from the electronic-payment-expenditure requirement

fields.name: isMpOrMepPoliticalFinancierTaxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 011: taxpayer is an MP/MEP whose compensation funds a political party
fields.description: Narrow declaration for members of Parliament/the European Parliament whose compensation and pension amounts contributed to a party or party coalition are excluded from that party's private-financing cap calculation, per Law 3023/2002 art. 8(5).

fields.name: isMpOrMepPoliticalFinancierSpouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 012: spouse/ΜΣΣ is an MP/MEP whose compensation funds a political party

fields.name: hasDisability80PercentOrMoreTaxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 905: taxpayer has disability of 80% or more
fields.description: The associated income-tax-exempt amounts are pre-filled at Κωδικοί 619-620 of Πίνακας 6 (out of scope for this v1.0.0); any withheld tax on salary/pension income covered by this exemption is entered at Κωδικοί 315-316 (netForeignSourceSalaryOrPensionIncomeGreeceTaxable's sibling withholding field, totalWithheldTaxOnEmploymentAndPensionIncome, modeled below).

fields.name: hasDisability80PercentOrMoreSpouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 906: spouse/ΜΣΣ has disability of 80% or more

fields.name: hasForeignIncomeOrAssetsTaxpayer
fields.label: Κωδικός 029: taxpayer has foreign income, foreign assets, or a foreign financial account
fields.description: Top-level Yes/No flag only. The source's own sub-panel (select the country, then one or more of: foreign income; foreign real estate/other property; a foreign-held financial account e.g. bank deposits/investments; or a foreign-issuer financial product invested through a domestic institution) is a repeating country/category breakdown out of scope for this v1.0.0 — disclosed as a companion-schedule candidate for a future cycle.

fields.name: hasForeignIncomeOrAssetsSpouse
fields.label: Κωδικός 030: spouse/ΜΣΣ has foreign income, foreign assets, or a foreign financial account

fields.name: hasQualifyingAdultDependentChildForMinimumLivingExpenseExemption
fields.label: Κωδικός 079: adult, unmarried dependent child (up to age 25) in vocational education/training, registered unemployed with DYPA, or on military service
fields.description: A single code (no separate taxpayer/spouse pair), new for tax year 2025, selected to avoid application of the minimum imputed living expense (ελάχιστη αντικειμενική δαπάνη) under article 31(1)(θ) ΚΦΕ for a qualifying adult dependent child.

fields.name: netSalaryAndWageIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 301-302: net income from salary/wages and benefits in kind
fields.description: The aggregate net amount received as an employee from salaries, day-wages, allowances, etc., plus any benefit-in-kind valuation that increases taxable income under article 13 ΚΦΕ. Also covers editors'/journalists' net compensation and lawyers' fixed compensation for legal services, and tour guides under Law 1545/1985 art. 37. Figures must reconcile with the employer-issued salaryOrPensionCertificate (documents[]). The primary in-scope income line for this v1.0.0's salaried pathway.

fields.name: netMainPensionIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 303-304: net income from main pensions

fields.name: netSupplementaryPensionIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 321-322: net income from supplementary pensions, dividends, and benefit funds

fields.name: netBoardMemberOrManagerFeeIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 325-326: board-member/company-manager fee income treated as employment income
fields.description: Pre-filled by the Tax Administration from its own electronic records (decision Α.1099/2019) where available: SA board-member fees (net of the associated social-security contributions), Ι.Κ.Ε. manager/partner fees, Ε.Π.Ε. manager/partner fees (net of contributions), and personal-company (O.E./E.E.) representative/partner fees for services necessary to the company's operation. Excludes any profit-distribution amounts to the same persons, which are dividends, not employment income.

fields.name: netSingleClientContractorEmploymentTreatedIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 307-308: single/near-single-client business income treated as employment income
fields.description: Net business-activity income (less social-security contributions) reclassified as employment income when the taxpayer has a written contract with clients, has no more than 3 clients (or ≥75% of gross business income from one of them), lacks commercial-trader status, and has a professional seat identical to their home address. For an article-5Γ (impatriate-employment) beneficiary, 50% of the net income from the new employment position is drawn and pre-filled here from Form Ε3; the other 50% is exempt and appears at Κωδικοί 659-660 (out of scope for this v1.0.0).

fields.name: netWorkVoucherIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 309-310: net income from work vouchers (εργόσημο)

fields.name: netEfkaAnalyticalStatementIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 311-312: income per e-ΕΦΚΑ analytical statements (building-industry stamps, self-insurance, etc.)

fields.name: netUnprefilledEmploymentIncomeFromCertificate
fields.label: Κωδικοί 343-344: employment/pension income (cases 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 15, 17) not already pre-filled, plus early-exercised stock-option income
fields.description: Completed when the taxpayer holds a certificate (employer/insurance-fund ΑΦΜ recorded) for income covered by 301-302, 303-304, 321-322, 325-326, 309-310, 397-398, or 359-360 that the e-filing has not already pre-filled. Also covers stock-option-exercise share income under article 13(4) ΚΦΕ when the shares are transferred before 24 months from grant.

fields.name: selfPaidMandatoryInsuranceContributions
fields.label: Κωδικοί 351-352: mandatory insurance contributions paid directly by the taxpayer
fields.description: A deduction, not income: contributions the salaried/pensioner taxpayer paid directly (not withheld through payroll) toward compulsory insurance-fund service-time buy-back, ΝΑΤ contributions, ΤΕΑ/ΙΕΣΠ occupational-pension contributions not withheld via payroll, or a trainee lawyer's compulsory health-insurance contributions. Contributions already withheld and remitted by an employer/insurance fund (and shown on the salary/pension certificate) are excluded.

fields.name: totalWithheldTaxOnEmploymentAndPensionIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 315-316: total tax withheld on the employment/pension income above
fields.description: Total tax withheld on the income at Κωδικοί 301-326 (cases 1-4 and 17 of this sub-table), plus any Greek tax withheld on the domestic athlete/coach income at Κωδικοί 359-360.

fields.name: withheldTaxOnUnprefilledEmploymentIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 347-348: tax withheld on the income declared at Κωδικοί 343-344
fields.description: Excludes any withheld tax already pre-filled at Κωδικοί 315-316.

fields.name: netForeignSourceSalaryOrPensionIncomeGreeceTaxable
fields.label: Κωδικοί 389-390: net foreign-source salary/pension income Greece has the right to tax
fields.description: Also covers compensation and pensions of Greek Members of the European Parliament under EP decision 2005/684/EC art. 9, sourced to the country of temporary residence during their term.

fields.name: foreignTaxPaidCreditOnForeignSalaryOrPensionIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 651-652: foreign tax paid, credited against the income at Κωδικοί 389-390
fields.description: The total tax proven paid abroad (withheld at source and/or paid afterward) on the income declared at netForeignSourceSalaryOrPensionIncomeGreeceTaxable, including tax paid to the European Parliament (selected under "other cases"). For US-source income, only the US federal tax (not state tax) is entered.

fields.name: netForeignSourceSalaryOrPensionIncomeExclusiveForeignTaxingRight
fields.label: Κωδικοί 391-392: net foreign-source salary/pension income taxable exclusively abroad under a tax treaty
fields.description: No Greek foreign-tax credit applies to this line, since Greece has no taxing right under the relevant tax treaty (ΣΑΔΦ).

fields.name: domesticEmployerPaidIncomeForServicesRenderedAbroadNotWithheld
fields.label: Κωδικοί 393-394: income paid by a domestic company for salaried services rendered abroad, not withheld in Greece
fields.description: Applies to a Greek tax resident paid by a domestic company for services rendered abroad, where no Greek withholding applied. Any Greek tax that was withheld in such cases instead belongs at totalWithheldTaxOnEmploymentAndPensionIncome (315-316), and foreign-withheld tax at foreignTaxPaidCreditOnForeignSalaryOrPensionIncome (651-652).

fields.name: foreignInsuranceSchemeLumpSumOrAnnuityPostJan2024
fields.label: Κωδικοί 395-396: foreign group-pension-scheme lump sum/annuity, accrued after 1-1-2024
fields.description: A benefit (periodic, lump-sum, or early-surrender) paid without Greek tax withholding by a foreign insurer with no permanent establishment in Greece, under a group pension-insurance contract the employer arranged with that insurer, for amounts accrued after 1 January 2024, per article 15(4a) ΚΦΕ. Amounts accrued up to 31 December 2023 are taxed separately under the prior regime and are out of scope for this field.

fields.name: domesticAthleteOrCoachIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 359-360: domestic-source income of paid athletes/coaches
fields.description: Pre-filled by the Tax Administration: total domestic-source income of paid athletes and coaches from domestic sports SAs, paid-athlete departments, or recognized sports clubs, and of team-sport referee trainers from domestic federations. Withheld Greek tax on this income is entered at totalWithheldTaxOnEmploymentAndPensionIncome (315-316).

fields.name: foreignAthleteOrCoachIncome
fields.label: Κωδικοί 397-398: foreign-source income of paid athletes/coaches

fields.name: foreignSeveranceOrTerminationCompensation
fields.label: Κωδικοί 387-388: lump-sum severance/termination compensation paid abroad
fields.description: Compensation paid abroad by any foreign entity with no permanent establishment in Greece, for any reason terminating an employment or other relationship linking that entity to the beneficiary, where Greece also has a taxing right. Any tax paid abroad on this amount belongs at foreignTaxPaidCreditOnForeignSalaryOrPensionIncome (651-652).

documents.label: Employer/insurance-fund salary or pension certificate (βεβαίωση αποδοχών/συντάξεων)
documents.handling: Its own reported gross/net figures, withholdings, and tax withheld must reconcile with this schema's netSalaryAndWageIncome/netMainPensionIncome/totalWithheldTaxOnEmploymentAndPensionIncome fields. Not submitted with an electronic filing — retained by the taxpayer and produced only if requested by the Tax Administration.

documents.label: Tax residence certificate (tax residence certificate)
documents.handling: Produced only if requested by the Tax Administration, for a filer declaring a foreign taxResidencyCountry, to prove the country of tax residency.

documents.label: Evidence of diplomatic/consular or EU/international-organization employment status
documents.handling: Produced only if requested by the Tax Administration, supporting isDiplomaticOrIntlOrgImputedIncomeExemptTaxpayer/Spouse (Κωδικοί 015-016): nationality/diplomatic-passport evidence, or a certificate from the employing embassy/consulate/EU institution/international organization.
